positive: A whimsical, highly stylized forest scene composed of mystical flora and geometric elements. Feature silhouetted ancient trees with glowing, luminescent bark, intertwined with abstract geometric patterns and oversized bioluminescent fungi. The main subject is a central, glowing river winding through the forest floor, reflecting star-like bokeh. Style must be clean, high-contrast, and graphic, inspired by Art Deco and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Color palette: Deep indigo, emerald green, gold accents, and cyan glow. Composition must be centralized and scalable for apparel printing, favoring bold silhouettes and minimal shading details. Intricate linework, vector aesthetic, highly decorative.
